description: Create a partial report iconic memory experiment (Sperling, 1960) in PsychoPy. The experiment must present a random 3x4 grid of consonants for exactly 50ms, followed immediately by an auditory cue (tone) whose frequency corresponds to the row to be reported. Use a conditions file located at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/sperling_conditions.csv with columns 'cue_freq' (e.g., 1000, 500, 250) and 'cued_row' (top, middle, bottom). The experiment should collect a keyboard response after the tone. Save the PsychoPy experiment file to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sperling_task.psyexp.
